raw_consumer_statement: L.L.Bean Mastercard Services through Citibank. A fraudulent charge was made on XX/XX/XXXX in the amount of {$980.00} for XXXX XXXX XXXX online via XXXX and a delivery made on XX/XX/XXXX to an address XXXX XXXX, XXXX XXXX, NY unknown to me, using an email and phone number which are not mine. I opened a dispute with L.L. Bean Mastercard Services on XX/XX/XXXX and was notified on XX/XX/XXXX that I was still responsible for this charge. I re-opened the dispute on XX/XX/XXXX due to being out of town when notification received. I received notice on XX/XX/XXXX that credit card company had concluded its investigation, concluded that I am responsible for the charges, and re-billed my account. I paid the bill online on XX/XX/XXXX to prevent collection action but am filing complaints with XXXX Attorney General and CFPB.
